title: 1 x Rosa Blue Moon Hybrid Tea Rose - Award-Winning Fragrant Lilac Blooms, 75-100cm, Bare Root, Long-Lasting Garden Rose, Perfect for Borders & Containers
features: Stunning Lilac Blooms – The Rosa 'Blue Moon' Hybrid Tea Rose is renowned for its large, fragrant lilac flowers that open into perfectly formed blooms, providing a timeless, elegant touch to any garden. A true classic with a delicate lavender colour, it’s perfect for adding sophistication to your garden beds or containers.

Award-Winning Beauty – Winner of multiple Gold Medals, Blue Moon is celebrated for its long-lasting blooms and resilience. This highly fragrant rose not only brings beauty to your garden but also attracts pollinators like bees and butterflies, making it a standout in any space.

Ideal for UK Gardens – Reaching a mature height of 75-100cm, this medium-sized rose thrives in the British climate, making it a great choice for borders, mixed beds, and patio containers. It flourishes in full sun, with easy care and a long flowering season from late spring through autumn.

Fragrant & Resilient – Known for its sweet, fruity fragrance, the Blue Moon rose fills garden with a delightful scent. It has strong disease resistance to common rose issues like black spot and powdery mildew, ensuring your plant stays healthy and vibrant year after year.

Bare Root, Easy to Plant – This bare-root rose is ready for planting in late autumn to early spring. When planted correctly, it establishes quickly, growing into a beautiful, low-maintenance rose bush that will produce continuous blooms throughout the summer. Perfect for novice and experienced gardeners alike.
description: Add timeless beauty and fragrance to your garden with the Rosa 'Blue Moon' Hybrid Tea Rose. Known for its award-winning blooms, this fragrant rose produces large, elegant lilac flowers that exude a sweet, fruity scent, perfect for creating a stunning focal point in any garden. Whether planted in borders, containers, or mixed flower beds, this medium-sized rose is ideal for bringing a splash of colour and elegance to your outdoor space. The Blue Moon rose thrives in full sun, making it a perfect choice for sunny gardens in the UK. Reaching a mature height of 75-100cm, it is perfectly suited for both small and larger gardens. Its beautiful purple-tinged blooms not only add vibrant colour but also attract pollinators like bees and butterflies, enhancing the biodiversity of your garden. With strong disease resistance to common issues like black spot and powdery mildew, the Blue Moon rose is a low-maintenance variety that’s easy to grow, even for beginners. Plant it as a bare root rose in late autumn or early spring, and with minimal care, you’ll enjoy long-lasting flowers from late spring through autumn. Regular deadheading encourages repeat flowering, ensuring your garden remains vibrant all summer long. Perfect for UK gardens, this scented rose will thrive in most soil types, particularly when well-drained and enriched with organic matter. The Rosa 'Blue Moon' Hybrid Tea Rose offers a captivating combination of elegance, fragrance, and beauty, making it a must-have for any rose enthusiast or lover of fragrant garden plants. Add this stunning rose to your garden today for years of enjoyment.
